series_metadata.series_description: Records are comprised of Deputy Registrar copies of Ohio Driver License/Identification card Applications (form BMV 2002) , signed Proof of Financial Responsibility (form BMV 3135), and other supporting documents. Record is a duplicate of documents maintained by Bureau of Motor Vehicles via schedule GK/MGK.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Hard copies are retained for four years from date of issuance in accordance with the Deputy Registrar Manual. ; Electronic: Machine readable copies are retained for seven years from date of issuance, then destroyed., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
